image:image.image:title: Flytora – Free Typing Game
image:image.image:caption: Type words to fly your bird through obstacles. Free browser typing game to improve WPM.

image:image.image:title: Flytora Gameplay 1
image:image.image:caption: Flytora gameplay screenshot 1 – type words to fly a bird through obstacles.

image:image.image:title: Flytora Gameplay 2
image:image.image:caption: Flytora gameplay screenshot 2 – Sprint mode showing high-speed word typing.

image:image.image:title: Flytora Gameplay 3
image:image.image:caption: Flytora gameplay screenshot 3 – Survival mode with power-ups and combos.

image:image.image:title: Flytora Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of Flytora, the free online typing game.
